resources.string: The hero cuts one string and tightens the noose of the next.
HERO CUTS ONE STRING. THE NEXT NOOSE TIGHTENS.

The board burns halfway through the move, exactly as planned. Contradictory letters arrive in familiar hands. Poison is offered with a smile, allies become doors, enemies become keys, and every discarded hero believes the escape was his own invention. Look closer: the rebellion, the betrayal, the stroke of chance—all of it knots into the final missing piece of the snare.
BOARD BURNS MID-MOVE. LETTERS CONTRADICT. POISON SMILES. ALLIES ARE DOORS. ENEMIES ARE KEYS. REBELLION COMPLETES THE TRAP.
